name: Muhammad Sahab
headline: Senior Software Engineer | Full Stack Developer | Python | Django | Flask | Fast API | React JS | JavaScript | Typescript | MySQL | MongoDB | PostgreSQL | Docker | Kubernetes | AWS | GCP | CI/CD | Git | GitHub
about:
Experienced Senior Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer having experience in Web Development. Passionate about creating scalable and innovative solutions. Adept at full-stack development, from concept to deployment. Proven expertise in Python, Django, Flask, Fast API, JavaScript, React JS, PostgreSQL and MongoDB. Committed to delivering high-quality, efficient, and user-centric applications. Open to exciting fully remote global opportunities.


𝗞𝗲𝘆 𝗥𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗲𝘀

•      Full-stack development using Full Stack (Python, React JS)
•      Designing and implementing scalable and efficient solutions.
•      Collaborating with cross-functional teams for project success.
•      Conducting code reviews and ensuring code quality.
•      Analyzing system requirements and prioritizing tasks.

𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗰𝘆

•	Backend Technologies: Python and related frameworks.
•	Front-end Technologies: HTML, CSS, and related frameworks.
•	React.js: Building responsive and interactive user interfaces.
•	JavaScript/TypeScript: Proficient in scripting languages.
•	RESTful API Design: Developing and consuming APIs.
•	Version Control: Git for code collaboration and version control.
•	Deployment: Experience with cloud platforms (e.g AWS, Azure) and containerization (Docker).
•	Testing: Unit testing and integration testing.


𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗛𝗶𝗴𝗵𝗹𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘀

•	Years of hands-on experience in Full Stack development.
•	Successful delivery of complex projects from conception to deployment.
•	Strong problem-solving skills and ability to optimize code for performance.
•	Adaptable to emerging technologies and industry best practices.

𝗦𝗼𝗳𝘁 𝗦𝗸𝗶𝗹𝗹𝘀

•	Effective communication and collaboration within cross-functional teams.
•	Leadership and mentorship capabilities.
•	Time management and project prioritization.
•	Continuous learning and staying updated with industry trends.

name: Muhammad Sameed
headline: Sr. Full Stack Developer | Tech Lead | Angular | Php Laravel
about:
As a 🚀 highly skilled Full Stack Developer with 6️⃣ years of experience, I have developed a strong foundation in various web development technologies and have expertise in Laravel, Ionic Angular, Vue JS, MySQL, DynamoDB, SEO, and AWS services.

Throughout my career, I have 🛠️ developed numerous web applications with seamless user experience and robust functionality. My proficiency in Laravel, Ionic Angular, and Vue JS enables me to create scalable and maintainable applications that meet client requirements.

My expertise in databases such as MySQL and DynamoDB has helped me design efficient and reliable data storage solutions for complex applications. In addition, my knowledge of SEO best practices allows me to create websites that are search engine friendly and optimized for higher search rankings.

My familiarity with AWS services such as EC2, S3, and RDS has enabled me to develop cloud-based applications that are highly available, scalable, and cost-effective.

I am a 🤝 team player with excellent communication skills and the ability to work well in a fast-paced environment. I am committed to delivering quality work within tight deadlines and ensuring client satisfaction.

Overall, I am confident that my experience and expertise in Full Stack Development, Laravel, Ionic Angular, Vue JS, MySQL, DynamoDB, SEO, and AWS services make me a valuable addition to any team in need of a skilled developer. 💪
